Global Variable# SLServiceTypeSinaWeibo

iOS 6.0–11.0DeprecatediPadOS 6.0–11.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.8–10.13Deprecated

```
let SLServiceTypeSinaWeibo: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/social/slservicetypesinaweibo#Discussion)

A string constant that identifies the social networking site, Sina Weibo.
